items.description: Caliper includes a vocabulary of actions for describing learning interactions. Each action is based on the past-tense form of an English (en-US) verb. An action can also indicate a change in a particular characteristic of the object (e.g., resolution, size, speed, volume). Each …

conformance.statement: Every Caliper Entity MUST carry a type matching the Caliper term for the entity (e.g. Person) and an id that is a unique, persistent IRI.
A Caliper Envelope MUST carry the emitting sensor, the dataVersion IRI, a sendTime, and the data payload.
Every Caliper Event MUST identify the actor, the action performed, and the object it was performed on.
Every Caliper Event MUST also carry its id, a type matching the Caliper term for the event, and an eventTime expressed in UTC (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.SSSZ).
Every Caliper Event id MUST be a UUID expressed as a urn:uuid:<UUID> (RFC 4122); every Entity id MUST be a unique, persistent IRI.
